extends.title: extends
extends.description: Extends one or many toolchain configuration files. Supports a relative file path or a secure URL. @since 1.12.0

proto.title: proto
proto.description: Configures how moon integrates with proto.

rust.title: rust
rust.description: Configures and enables the Rust toolchain. Docs: https://moonrepo.dev/docs/config/toolchain#rust

BinConfig.description: Configures to a tool-specific global binary to install.

bin.title: bin
bin.description: Name of the binary, with optional version separated by @.
bin.markdownDescription: Name of the binary, with optional version separated by `@`.

force.title: force
force.description: Force install the binary if it already exists.

local.title: local
local.description: Only install the binary locally, and not within CI.

name.title: name
name.description: For supported tools, a custom name to use.

BinConfig.markdownDescription: Configures to a tool-specific global binary to install.

BinEntry.description: Configures to a tool-specific global binary to install.
BinEntry.markdownDescription: Configures to a tool-specific global binary to install.

MoonConfig.description: Configures how and where moon updates will be received.

downloadUrl.title: downloadUrl
downloadUrl.description: A secure URL for downloading the moon binary itself.

manifestUrl.title: manifestUrl
manifestUrl.description: A secure URL to lookup the latest available version.

PluginLocator.description: Strategies and protocols for locating plugins.

ProtoConfig.description: Configures how moon integrates with proto.

version.title: version
version.description: The version of proto to download and install, and to use for installing and running other toolchains.

RustToolchainConfig.description: Configures and enables the Rust toolchain. Docs: https://moonrepo.dev/docs/config/toolchain#rust

addMsrvConstraint.title: addMsrvConstraint
addMsrvConstraint.description: When version is defined, syncs the version as a constraint to Cargo.toml under the workspace.package.rust-version or package.rust-version fields.
addMsrvConstraint.markdownDescription: When `version` is defined, syncs the version as a constraint to `Cargo.toml` under the `workspace.package.rust-version` or `package.rust-version` fields.

bins.title: bins
bins.description: List of binaries to install into the environment using cargo binstall.
bins.markdownDescription: List of binaries to install into the environment using `cargo binstall`.

binstallVersion.title: binstallVersion
binstallVersion.description: The fully-qualified version of cargo-binstall to install. Defaults to "latest" if not defined.
binstallVersion.markdownDescription: The fully-qualified version of `cargo-binstall` to install. Defaults to "latest" if not defined.

components.title: components
components.description: List of Rust components to automatically install with rustup.
components.markdownDescription: List of Rust components to automatically install with `rustup`.

syncToolchainConfig.title: syncToolchainConfig
syncToolchainConfig.description: When version is defined, syncs the version to rust-toolchain.toml under the toolchain.channel field.
syncToolchainConfig.markdownDescription: When `version` is defined, syncs the version to `rust-toolchain.toml` under the `toolchain.channel` field.

targets.title: targets
targets.description: List of Rust targets to automatically install with rustup.
targets.markdownDescription: List of Rust targets to automatically install with `rustup`.

version.title: version
version.description: Configured version (channel) to download and install with rustup.
version.markdownDescription: Configured version (channel) to download and install with `rustup`.

inheritAliases.title: inheritAliases
inheritAliases.description: Inherit aliases (name derived from a manifest) for all projects associated with this toolchain. @since 2.1.0

installDependencies.title: installDependencies
installDependencies.description: Run the InstallDependencies actions for each running task when changes to lockfiles and manifests are detected. @since 2.1.0
installDependencies.markdownDescription: Run the `InstallDependencies` actions for each running task when changes to lockfiles and manifests are detected. @since 2.1.0

plugin.title: plugin
plugin.description: Location of the WASM plugin to use.

version.title: version
version.description: The version of the toolchain to download and install.

versionFromPrototools.title: versionFromPrototools
versionFromPrototools.description: Inherit the version from the root .prototools. When true, matches using the same identifier, otherwise a string can be provided for a custom identifier.
versionFromPrototools.markdownDescription: Inherit the version from the root `.prototools`. When true, matches using the same identifier, otherwise a string can be provided for a custom identifier.

ToolchainPluginVersionFrom.description: The strategy in which to inherit a version from .prototools.
ToolchainPluginVersionFrom.markdownDescription: The strategy in which to inherit a version from `.prototools`.

UnresolvedVersionSpec.description: Represents an unresolved version or alias that must be resolved to a fully-qualified version.
UnresolvedVersionSpec.markdownDescription: Represents an unresolved version or alias that must be resolved to a fully-qualified version.

VersionSpec.description: Represents a resolved version or alias.
